repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.mobile.ios: SwiftUI and UIKit view lifecycle, @State data flow, ARC retain cycles, provisioning and signing, background modes, and App Store privacy with main-thread UI updates
implement a gRPC service in Go running on a Linux server

retrieval_query: ios swiftui uikit view lifecycle state arc retain cycle provisioning signing background mode app store privacy main thread combine

validation_smoke.name: code.mobile.ios L3 validation smoke
signals: all UI updates dispatched on the main thread (no main-thread checker warnings)
no retain cycles (Instruments shows no leaked view controllers/objects)
SwiftUI view re-renders from a single source of truth
app archives and signs with a valid provisioning profile
privacy usage strings present for every sensitive API used

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.mobile.ios diagnosis smoke
signals: UI updated from a background thread (purple main-thread warning)
retain cycle between a closure and self leaking a view controller
SwiftUI state mutated without @State/@Published so the view never updates
missing or wrong provisioning profile blocking install
accessing a sensitive API with no Info.plist usage string, crashing on launch
